visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt and blue cargo jeans, sits on a bed with a colorful floral blanket. She initially looks thoughtful with her hand to her chin, then smiles and points her index finger upwards. The background is a brightly lit indoor bedroom with beige wardrobes. (2) A man wearing a white t-shirt and grey joggers enters the frame. They engage in a playful conversation; he gestures towards her and himself, laughing heartily. The woman reacts with laughter and gestures back. (3) A close-up shot displays two bottles of Lenor laundry scent beads, one blue and one white, with decorative labels. Graphic overlays highlighting brand features appear on the screen. (4) The scene returns to the bedroom where the man pulls a grey t-shirt from the wardrobe. The woman leans in to smell the garment and expresses pleasant surprise. (5) The man is shown outdoors, wearing a black sports jacket and a cap. He pulls at his collar to smell the fabric, looking satisfied. (6) Close-up shots show liquid being poured into a washing machine dispenser, followed by the man pouring blue scent beads from a bottle cap into the machine. (7) The man is seen putting pink clothes into the washing machine while smiling and looking at the camera. (8) The final shot shows the man in the foreground holding and pointing to two bottles of the product, while the woman sits on the bed in the background, smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: Q:你喜歡他什麼? [Subtitle]: 我覺得... (2) [Subtitle]: 他很乾淨. (3) [Subtitle]: 也很舒服. (4) [Subtitle]: 啊還很持久. (5) [Subtitle]: 還好啦. (6) [Subtitle]: 這樣誇獎我. (7) [Subtitle]: 潔癖是有啦. (8) [Subtitle]: 舒服也當然是不惶多讓啦. (9) [Subtitle]: 持久還好. (10) [Variety]: 是在公3... (11) [Subtitle]: 真的還好啦. (12) [Subtitle]: 不是. (13) [Subtitle]: 我是在講我的衣服. (14) [Subtitle]: 喔衣服喔. (15) [Subtitle]: 那是因為我洗衣服的時候. (16) [Subtitle]: 都有加蘭諾衣物芳香豆. (17) [Logo]: 日本NO.1 蘭諾衣物芳香豆. [Slogan]: 鎖住乾淨 持續衣香. (18) [Subtitle]: 無論從衣櫃裡拿出哪一件. (19) [Subtitle]: 味道都是一樣清新舒服. (20) [Subtitle]: 欸還真的欸. (21) [Subtitle]: 我以為是剛洗完餒. (22) [Subtitle]: 厲害齁. (23) [Subtitle]: 他的味道真的超持久. (24) [Subtitle]: 你就算在外面一整天. (25) [Subtitle]: 回家衣服都還是有淡淡的香味. (26) [Subtitle]: 想要持久衣香嗎. (27) [Subtitle]: 只要洗衣服的時候多一步驟. (28) [Subtitle]: 加入蘭諾衣物芳香豆. (29) [Subtitle]: 就OK! (30) [Subtitle]: 就這麼簡單. (31) [Variety]: 換季. [Variety]: 久放衣櫃. [Variety]: 外景一整天. (32) [Subtitle]: 衣服也不會有怪味喔. (33) [Logo]: 蘭諾. [Slogan]: 鎖住乾淨衣香12週. (34) [Subtitle]: 蘭諾衣物芳香豆. (35) [Subtitle]: 乾淨衣香首選! (36) [Subtitle]: 輕鬆又有效.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main character and 1 female main character are present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man has short dark hair and wears a white t-shirt with grey joggers, later seen in a black jacket and cap. The woman has long dark hair and wears a white oversized t-shirt and blue cargo jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary indoor setting is a bedroom with light-colored wardrobes, a bed with a colorful floral comforter, and warm ambient lighting. A brief outdoor scene features a modern building facade under bright daylight. A laundry area with a white front-loading washing machine is also shown.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins with a thoughtful, curious tone, followed by a light, upbeat synth-pop background track starting at a moderate tempo. (2) A male voice enters energetically, laughing and engaging in rapid-fire dialogue with the female speaker. A playful 'pop' sound effect accompanies a visual realization. (3) The male voice shifts into a professional yet enthusiastic narrative tone, clearly mentioning the brand 'Lenor' (蘭諾). A metallic 'ding' SFX punctuates the presentation of the product. (4) Sound of a drawer sliding open followed by a clear liquid pouring sound and the rhythmic rattling of scent beads into a plastic cap. (5) A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX marks a scene change as the male voice continues describing the product's long-lasting fragrance benefits. (6) The video concludes with both voices in high spirits, with the BGM building to a bright finish as the male speaker delivers a final call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Lenor scent beads by demonstrating their effectiveness in providing long-lasting fragrance and a sense of freshness to laundry, framed through a humorous interaction between a couple.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, mention of brand name, and demonstration of product usage and benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy, comedy-driven narrative typical of social media advertising to engage viewers before delivering a direct product pitch.
